title: Huawei FMC2105-SA - Field Connector SC/APC
description: Huawei FMC2105-SA is reusable dedicated field mountable SC connector with APC polishing. It can be re-assembled for at least five times. Connector passes the 500-hour accelerated aging test at 75°C/95% RH The connector is intended for Huawei transparent optical cables 2 x 1.6mm and 1.2 x 1.6 mm and terminal flexible optical cables 2 x 3 mm and 2 x 1.6 mm * Photo for illustration purposes only
